CONTENT: 1️⃣ Audit Active Commitments
Open filter: @commitment — review every item returned @when-weekly @duration-10m
For each @commitment item: is it still valid? @when-weekly @duration-10m
Mark any expired or completed commitments as done @when-weekly @duration-10m
Renegotiate or remove any overdue @commitment items you can no longer honour @when-weekly @duration-10m
Confirm remaining @commitment items are still on track @when-weekly @duration-10m
2️⃣ Triage Waiting Items
Open filter: @waiting — review every item returned @when-weekly @duration-5m
Chase up any @waiting item that has been outstanding for more than one week @when-weekly @duration-5m
Close out any @waiting item where the external dependency has resolved @when-weekly @duration-5m
Convert unresolvable @waiting items to @someday or delete entirely @when-weekly @duration-5m
3️⃣ Review Someday / Maybe
Open filter: @someday — review every item returned @when-weekly @duration-5m
Promote any @someday item that is now relevant and actionable @when-weekly @duration-5m
Add @commitment label to promoted items and assign a clear next action @when-weekly @duration-5m
Remove any @someday items that are no longer interesting or viable @when-weekly @duration-5m
4️⃣ Process Review Queue
Open filter: @review — review every item returned @when-weekly @duration-5m
For each @review item: decide to activate
Replace @review label with the appropriate label: @commitment @waiting or @someday @when-weekly @duration-5m
Ensure no item remains tagged @review after this session @when-weekly @duration-5m
5️⃣ Reset & Recommit
Count total active @commitment items @when-weekly @duration-5m
Is the commitment load sustainable for next week? @when-weekly @duration-5m
If overloaded: defer at least one @commitment to @someday @when-weekly @duration-5m
If underloaded: consider promoting one @someday item to @commitment @when-weekly @duration-5m
Write your top three commitments for the week ahead @when-weekly @duration-5m
6️⃣ Update & Align
Confirm all retained @commitment items have a clear next action @when-weekly @duration-5m
Ensure each @waiting item has an expected resolution date or a chase date @when-weekly @duration-5m
Archive or delete any tasks that no longer belong in the system @when-weekly @duration-5m
Note any system or process improvements to make next week @when-weekly @duration-5m
